title: Commercial Pest Control Upper West Side | $175–$1,500/mo
metaDescription: Professional commercial pest control for Upper West Side businesses. Protect restaurants, shops & offices from pests. $175–$1,500/mo. Licensed, insured & trusted in Manhattan.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive commercial pest control services throughout the Upper West Side, protecting restaurants, retail stores, offices, and residential buildings from infestations. Our experienced technicians understand the unique pest pressures facing Manhattan businesses, from rodents in older brownstones to cockroaches in high-traffic commercial spaces. We offer customized treatment plans starting at $175/month to keep your Upper West Side establishment pest-free year-round.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Manhattan's Upper West Side, we understand the specific pest challenges facing businesses near Central Park, along Broadway, and throughout this bustling neighborhood. Our discreet, effective treatments are designed to protect your reputation while ensuring full compliance with NYC health codes and regulations.
localContext: The Upper West Side's mix of historic brownstones, pre-war apartment buildings, bustling restaurants along Columbus and Amsterdam Avenues, and proximity to Central Park creates unique pest control challenges for commercial properties. From mice seeking warmth in older buildings to cockroaches in food service establishments and occasional bed bug issues in hospitality venues, our team provides targeted solutions that respect the neighborhood's character while delivering results.

faqs.question: What does commercial pest control cost in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Commercial pest control in the Upper West Side ranges from $175 to $1,500 per month depending on your business size, pest type, and treatment frequency. Small retail shops and offices typically start at $175–$350/month, while restaurants and larger commercial spaces range from $400–$1,500/month. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Upper West Side businesses.

faqs.question: What pests are most common in Upper West Side commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Upper West Side businesses most commonly deal with mice and rats (especially in older buildings and near the park), cockroaches (particularly German cockroaches in restaurants), bed bugs in hospitality venues, and occasional ants. The neighborhood's dense commercial activity, aging infrastructure, and proximity to Central Park make regular professional pest control essential for maintaining a pest-free environment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a pest emergency in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day emergency pest control service for Upper West Side commercial clients. We understand that pest sightings can impact your business operations and reputation, especially for restaurants and retail establishments. Our local Manhattan team can typically respond within 2-4 hours for urgent situations during business hours.

faqs.question: Do you work with Upper West Side restaurants and food service businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in pest control for Upper West Side restaurants, cafes, bakeries, and food service establishments. Our technicians are trained in NYC Department of Health regulations and provide discreet services that work around your business hours. We offer monthly monitoring, comprehensive documentation for health inspections, and integrated pest management programs that meet all city requirements for food service establishments.
